mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oc_order_element_item (order_id, order_line_id, element_id, element_item_id, element_type_code, attr_code, attr_value, modify_tag, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderLineId}, #{elementId}, #{elementItemId}, #{elementTypeCode}, #{attrCode}, #{attrValue}, #{modifyTag}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})

INSERT INTO oc_order_element_item (order_id, order_line_id, element_id, element_item_id, element_type_code, attr_code, attr_value, modify_tag, start_date, end_date) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.orderLineId}, #{item.elementId}, #{item.elementItemId}, #{item.elementTypeCode}, #{item.attrCode}, #{item.attrValue}, #{item.modifyTag}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate})
